data.body: Plan-review triage (PASS, 0 blocking): remediated 6→3 advisory across two passes (content-hash algo/source, sign-time citation extraction, P9→registry.py, signed-map-authoritative claim check, perf-measurement test, per-path manifest shape). Remaining 3 advisory judged adequately addressed, not churned further: (1) f7d81 ADR-in-Scope — ADR docs/adr/0002 already authored, listing it in Scope is cosmetic; (2) f49757 perf bound — AC already mandates a measuring test with a single-digit-ms bound, exact fixture is an impl detail; (3) f8e002 concurrent working-tree mutation between sign/claim — design fails SAFE (claim hashes current working tree; any in-flight difference conservatively invalidates). Claiming on the current valid attestation rather than invalidating it for cosmetic edits.
